effects.name: Mental Strain
effects.description: Your mind is reeling from overcasting. Concentration regen reduced.

effects.name: Crane Stance
effects.description: A fluid, defensive stance. Increases Wisdom and Defense.

effects.name: Turtle Stance
effects.description: A defensive stance granting immunity to knockdowns.

effects.name: Magic Shield
effects.description: Absorbs 50% of incoming damage into Concentration.

effects.name: Volatile Reaction
effects.description: Your blood boils with alchemical energy.

effects.name: Evasive Step
effects.description: You are moving unpredictably to dodge attacks.

effects.name: Burning
effects.description: You are on fire!

effects.name: Singing (Courage)
effects.description: You are performing the Song of Courage.

effects.name: Sanctified
effects.description: Protected by holy ground. Damage reduced.

effects.name: Malediction
effects.description: Cursed. You suffer backlash damage when attacking.

effects.name: Off Balance
effects.description: Unsteady and vulnerable to finishers.

effects.name: Shattered Mind
effects.description: Your concentration is broken, and your mind is vulnerable. You cannot cast spells and you take increased damage from blunt and disruption attacks.

effects.name: Crane's Echo
effects.description: The lingering grace of the Crane.

effects.name: Turtle's Echo
effects.description: The lingering resilience of the Turtle.

effects.name: Evasive
effects.description: Moving with supernatural flow.

effects.name: Braced
effects.description: Prepared for impact. Damage taken is reduced.

effects.name: Atrophy
effects.description: Your muscles waste away. Stamina regeneration is disabled.

effects.name: Haste
effects.description: Your movements are supernaturally fast. Increases attack frequency and evasion.

effects.name: Blinded
effects.description: Your vision is obscured by a brilliant spray of shifting colors. Accuracy reduced.

effects.name: Echo Shield
effects.description: Surrounded by illusory doubles that can absorb physical impact.

effects.name: Blur
effects.description: Your form is shimmering and difficult to target.

effects.name: Hexed
effects.description: Marked by entropic energy. Defense reduced.

effects.name: Metamorphosis
effects.description: Transformed into a demonic entity. Strength and dark resonance increased.
